title: Ad Oreganized
description: A mod that adds Ad Astra blocks and processing to the materials from Oreganized
body:
# Features
## Blocks
### Variants of blocks for lead, silver and electrum:
- Plating (Stairs, Slabs, Buttons, Pressure plates...)
- Plateblocks
- Pillars
- Glowing Pillars
###   Other blocks:
1x1 Painting of the mods logo

## Items
### Variants of items for lead, silver and electrum:
- Rods
- Plates
- Tanks (currently uncraftable)
###   Other Items:
- Debug Hammer (for crafting plates, will be removed once I add the recipe using Ad Astra's Compressor)

##   Other Features:
- Electrum is now made by putting 1 Silver ingot and 1 Gold Ingot into Ad Astra's special Blast Furnace, thus being cheaper but requiring energy and machines

# Other
- This mod requires both [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) and [Oreganized](https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized)
